_title: Mortal Kombat tournament — FGC engine mock (sets / games / rounds)

_engine_notes.detection: tournamentLooksLikeFgc() triggers when name/mode/type matches 'mortal kombat' OR tournaments.fgc_config is non-empty.
_engine_notes.scores: For each GAME row, score_a and score_b are ROUND WINS in that game (e.g. 2–1 = first to 2 rounds). Set = best-of games (like COD best-of maps).
_engine_notes.sql_first: Run warzongg-api/sql/fgc_tournament_engine.sql in Supabase before POST /api/matches with create_fgc_set.

prerequisites: API running; admin JWT for write routes.
Two team UUIDs with approved registrations on this tournament.
Replace all PLACEHOLDER_* values with real UUIDs from your project.

critical_fields.mode_sent_to_api: Will become mode = "Mortal Kombat · 1v1 · PS5 · FT2 rounds · Bo3 games" — contains mortal kombat → FGC engine.

body.name: Mortal Kombat — Pit Championship 2026 (Mock)
body.mode: Mortal Kombat · 1v1 · PS5 · FT2 rounds per game, Bo3 per set
body.format: Double elimination (bracket TBD) — sets are Bo3 games
body.description: Mock MK event for FGC engine tests. Rounds in score_a/score_b; sets via create_fgc_set.

step_1c_optional_fgc_config_patch.note: Optional; create_fgc_set can still pass games_best_of and rounds on the set row. Empty fgc_config still works if name includes Mortal Kombat.

step_2_approve_two_teams: Same as other mocks: captains register; admin approves in Participants so match dropdowns work.

step_3_create_set_and_first_game.description: One POST creates fgc_match_sets + first game row (fgc_game_number 1).
step_3_create_set_and_first_game.response_capture: match.id = MATCH_GAME_1_ID, and response data should include fgc_set_id (or read back GET /api/matches?tournament_id=...). Save FGC_SET_ID = match.fgc_set_id

step_4a_complete_game_1.story: Scorpion wins the first game 2–1 in rounds.

step_4b_create_game_2_scheduled.note: fgc_game_number auto-increments (2) when fgc_set_id is set and number omitted.

step_4c_complete_game_2_sub_wins.story: Sub-Zero evens the set: wins game 2 with 2–0 rounds.

step_4d_decider_game_3.expected_set_outcome: 2–1 games → Scorpion wins the set; fgc_match_sets.status = complete, winner_team_id = Scorpion. Global teams W/L updated once for the set (same pattern as COD series).

verification.check_set_in_db: Table Editor → fgc_match_sets: one row with winner_team_id and status complete after game 3.
